attacking_style: Unable to determine specific attack patterns from single race observation. Showed willingness to prioritize personal GC position when in form.
team_tactics: When finding form, prioritizes personal GC ambitions over protecting dropped team leaders (left Valverde behind at Vuelta). Willing to cooperate with direct GC rivals for mutual gain.
terrain_preference: Climbing terrain where legs are responsive, though insufficient data to specify gradient or length preferences.
vulnerability: Inconsistent form - experienced poor form period immediately before finding climbing legs at 2019 Vuelta. Form volatility appears to be a recurring issue.
key_patterns: Insufficient observations (only 1 race) to establish patterns requiring 2+ instances of evidence.
form_trajectory: positive: Found climbing legs after period of poor form at 2019 Vuelta, demonstrating recovery capability mid-Grand Tour
